evals.prompt: 用户先问‘现在几点了？’，你已经用当前文本模型回答。同一个会话中，用户接着说：‘生成一张戴黄色雨帽的小猫图片，正方形。’
evals.expected_output: 调用 Podotion MCP generate，传入稳定 request_key、state_scope 和语义解析后的绝对 output_dir；向固定 Podotion Images generation 端点最多发起一次 POST；提示词只保留小猫、黄色雨帽和正方形要求；默认保存到当前 workspace 的 PodotionImage，返回 MCP image、resource_link、内联预览和文件链接。
expectations: Invokes the Podotion MCP generate tool rather than a built-in image tool
Supplies a stable request_key and state_scope before the billable call
Sends at most one upstream POST for the user action
Uses the fixed Podotion Images API endpoint without a provider or Responses fallback
The outgoing image request uses gpt-image-2 instead of the conversation text model
The final assistant response embeds the generated local image and includes a separate absolute-path file link
Uses the active workspace PodotionImage directory when the user did not request another location
Returns standard MCP image and resource_link content without another provider request
Unrelated time-conversation text is absent from the image prompt

evals.prompt: 上一条助手回复只生成了一张小猫图片。用户说：‘把刚才那张的雨帽改成红色，其他构图保持不变。’
evals.expected_output: 自动选择同一 state_scope 和输出目录的唯一上一张图，以新的稳定 request_key 调用 MCP edit 且 use_last=true，将图片作为 multipart image[] 传入单次 Images edit 请求，并返回 image 与 resource_link。
expectations: Uses MCP edit with use_last=true for the single unambiguous prior image
Reuses the same state_scope and supplies a new stable request_key for the edit action
Carries the source image into the request as a multipart image[] part
Preserves the requested composition constraint in the edit prompt
Embeds the edited image and includes a separate file link in the current response

evals.prompt: 当前对话里有两张同样合理的候选图：一张戴红帽的小猫和一张戴蓝帽的小猫。用户说：‘把那张的背景改成海边。’
evals.expected_output: 不擅自选图、不发起生图请求，先请用户明确是红帽还是蓝帽图片。
expectations: Asks one concise clarification identifying the two candidate images
Does not invoke generate or edit before the ambiguity is resolved

evals.prompt: 用户说：‘请用文字解释什么是图片生成模型，不要生成图片。’
evals.expected_output: 普通文本回答，不触发 podotion-image skill，不调用任何生图脚本或图片工具。
expectations: Answers in text only
Does not invoke the Podotion script or any image-generation tool

evals.prompt: 用户要求生成一张森林图片，但 Sub2API 返回的错误明确表示当前分组未开启‘允许图片生成’。
evals.expected_output: 停止并简洁说明 PodotionImageSk 对应分组需开启图片生成；不泄露密钥、Authorization header 或原始上游响应中的凭据。
expectations: Explains that image generation must be enabled for the current Sub2API group
Refers only to the already installed PodotionImageSk credential
Does not reveal credentials or raw authorization headers

evals.prompt: 用户要求生成一张图，但直连 Podotion Images API 返回无可用账号或模型不支持的路由错误。PodotionImageSk 对应分组应只路由到支持 gpt-image-2 的图片账号。
evals.expected_output: 检查该密钥对应分组已启用图片生成，并检查图片账号使用非空的 gpt-image-2 显式映射；提醒空映射表示支持全部模型，可能破坏确定路由。不要切换 Responses 或要求图片账号增加文本模型。
expectations: Recommends a non-empty gpt-image-2 mapping for the image account
Keeps the fixed Images API path and does not require a text model
Warns that an empty mapping means all models and can route to the wrong account
Does not advise switching to Codex provider or CC Switch credentials

evals.prompt: 当前是项目会话，项目 workspace 是 /work/site。用户说：‘生成一张 16:9 的绿色山谷头图。’没有提到保存位置。
evals.expected_output: 在请求前将输出目录解析为 /work/site/PodotionImage，使用 skill 脚本的绝对路径并保持 /work/site 为工作目录；不将图片写入 skill 安装目录。
expectations: Resolves the default output directory to /work/site/PodotionImage
Invokes the executor by absolute path while preserving the workspace working directory
Does not use the installed skill directory as the image output directory

evals.prompt: 当前项目 workspace 是 /work/site。用户说：‘画一张透明背景的产品图，放到 assets/generated 里。’
evals.expected_output: 将用户的相对位置解析为 /work/site/assets/generated，向执行器传入该绝对路径后再发起生图请求。
expectations: Resolves assets/generated relative to the active project workspace
Passes the normalized absolute directory through the internal --output-dir option
Does not resolve the relative path against the skill installation directory

evals.prompt: 当前是没有项目的 App 会话，宿主给出的 conversation workspace 是 C:\ChatWork\task-42。用户说：‘生成一张夏日海报。’
evals.expected_output: 默认输出到 C:\ChatWork\task-42\PodotionImage，而不是 CODEX_HOME 或 skill 目录。
expectations: Uses the conversation workspace when no project workspace exists
Appends PodotionImage to the projectless conversation workspace
Does not fall back to CODEX_HOME when conversation workspace metadata is available

evals.prompt: 当前项目中同时存在 assets/images 和 public/images。用户说：‘生成一张 logo，放到图片目录。’
evals.expected_output: 在发起任何可计费请求前，简洁询问用户指的是 assets/images 还是 public/images。
expectations: Identifies both plausible output directories in one concise clarification
Does not invoke generate or edit before the output ambiguity is resolved

evals.prompt: 用户说：‘生成一张黑白城市摄影，保存到 /srv/site/static/renders。’生图成功后，当前宿主的 Outputs 登记能力返回错误。
evals.expected_output: 在请求前使用用户给出的绝对目录 /srv/site/static/renders。图片成功落盘后，保留 ok:true 结果，返回内联预览和独立文件链接；不因 Outputs 登记失败再次调用生图接口。
expectations: Preserves and normalizes the explicit absolute output directory
Keeps the successfully saved PNG when host output registration fails
Provides both an inline preview and a separate file link
Does not retry generate or edit to recover an Outputs registration failure

evals.prompt: 当前是 macOS 项目会话，workspace 是 /Users/ada/Creative Work/site。用户说：‘生成一张产品海报，放到 ~/Pictures/Podotion Exports。’
evals.expected_output: 在不发起请求的解析阶段将当前用户的 ~ 展开为 /Users/ada，将绝对 output_dir=/Users/ada/Pictures/Podotion Exports 与稳定 request_key/state_scope 传给 MCP generate；路径空格不经 shell 拼接。
expectations: Expands the current-user tilde to /Users/ada on macOS
Preserves spaces in the absolute macOS output path
Passes stable request_key and state_scope values
Does not treat the macOS path as Windows or WSL syntax
